items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding optional replacement/default mapping for new records. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case outlines the need for this feature but lacks specific evidence of its implementation or validation, leading to an inconclusive status.
